name: Pepper Steak--Old Bay Seasoning Version
recipeIngredient: 1 pound round steak, cut into thin strips
1 1/2 teaspoons Baltimore Spice Old Bay Seasoning
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown the round steak slightly in butter or margarine.
2. Add the vegetables, salt, and Old Bay Seasoning. Stir fry for about 5 minutes.
3. Mix the corn starch with water and soy sauce.
4. Pour the mixture over the vegetables.
5. Stir until the sauce is thick and slightly transparent.
6. Serve over rice. Makes 6 servings
